posts.raw_content:
Zionism is an elitist and racist political ideology based on Talmudic Judaism, a false form of Judaic religion. Zionism has gone by many different names throughout the world, but it is essentially pure Dark occultism at its core. 

Talmudic Judaism believes in the superiority of the Jewish race/religion and the slavery of ‘lesser’ people not ‘chosen’ by God, who they see as cattle and property. Zionism often hides behind traditional Judaism, using it as a scapegoat, while simultaneously doing harm to legitimate Jews. 

While Zionists would insist they are the polar opposite of Nazis, their core ideology is virtually identical in belief and methodology to the religion of Nazism, with one of the only differences being which race is idealized as the “Master Race,’ Germans or Jews. 

Zionist ‘Christianity’ is a complete oxymoron in terms.

 Christian Zionism is an extremist and racist form of false Christianity in which religious fundamentalists identify themselves as ‘Christian,’ but believe in and follow Talmudic and Zionist ideology.

 These so-called ‘Christians’ identify with the State of Israel and support everything that Israel does in the Middle East, including the slavery and genocide of the Palestinian people. 

Palestine is a land that was invaded by Zionists and taken by force using the erroneous belief system of Zionist entitlement and superiority with the full backing of the British and U.S. militaries, Even many fake ‘Christians’ who are not self-described ‘Christian Zionists’ but buy into some of Zionism’s lower-level ideologies, including the unquestioning support of the State of Israel on ‘religious grands,’”

Zionism is a creation of the illuminati cult, used to create division. Zionists are either knowing, or ignorant peddlers of the new world order. 

They are two wings of the same Illuminati bird where both wings with different ideologies are working for the same end, that being the Marxist wing, which one half of Christianity embraces, especially the modern-day Pope and what many refer to as “liberal” Christians, then you have the other end of the spectrum of Christianity that embraces Zionism.

 Both ideologies are engrained in all forms of Christianity, and the many thousands of Protestant denominations tend to lean one way or another. 

One key figure, C.I. Scofield, got part of Christianity to support the Cabalistic Messianic agenda to usher in the “new Messianic Age” where their “messiah” is supposed to descend from “King David via Solomon” and will rule the world from Jerusalem. 

Cyrus Scofield (1843-1921), who was an Illuminati agent, whose 1909 annotated Bible duped countless evangelicals into unconditional support of zionism. 

A flawed foundation lies under most evangelicals’ understanding of God’s moral dealings with humanity and particularly Jews. 

This foundation drives their support of the Jewish state. It is called ‘Scofield Dispensationalism.’ 

Written at the dawn of the modem Zionist movement, Scofield’s commentaries suggested that a nation of suffering and persecuted Jews, though Christ-rejecting, had a divine right to return and occupy Palestine. 

This idea was virtually absent from Christianity before the mid-1800s. How did such permission gain so great a foothold that it’s now unquestioned dogma for most evangelicals? ... CYRUS SCOFIELD.

 Cyrus Scofield taught that .., God gave the patriarch and his descendants unconditional rights as God’s chosen people. They were guaranteed the Promised Land and rights of occupation, even without obedience. Scofield said Israelites automatically receive ‘all blessings’ by just being there... 

Scofield, as no other figure, legitimized Christian participation in Zionism.

 Evangelicals then united pre-tribulationism and its ‘rapture escapism’ with Zionism. 

The new prophetic script for Christians read like this: ‘The right of God’s dispersed and persecuted chosen people to the Promised Land is covenanted to them by God unconditionally, forever. It is the duty of every Christian to honor God’s great last day’s regathering of His people, bidding them Godspeed by any possible means. If any nation or person refuses to stand by God and the Jewish nation, he is in league with Satan’...
